ideation: This sequence depicts two individuals engaged in a wrestling match.  The animation will focus on the dynamic interplay of arms, emphasizing the struggle and exertion involved.  Because the robot has no elbows, the poses will focus on shoulder movements to simulate grappling and exertion.  I'll use slight variations in wrist positioning to add realism to the struggle. The sequence will use both arms for each of the two wrestlers, with each arm's movement reflecting the other's.  The movements will be powerful and fluid, capturing the intensity of the moment.  Let's get started!

frames.beat: arms grapple and strain, locked in a struggle
the arms shift, pushing and pulling against each other
a moment of intense exertion, muscles tensed
the arms twist and wrench, seeking an advantage
